ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "nid_number" INTEGER /* National ID number of the employee */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designation the employee belongs to */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Twelve digit taxpayer's identification number */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the employee belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date of joining of the employee */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_laws" (
  "tax_law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax law */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the tax law belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the tax law belongs to */,
  "tax_bracket" REAL /* Tax bracket for the tax law */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the tax law */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_law_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the country the region belongs to
National ID number of the employee
ID of the designation the employee belongs to
ID of the region the employee belongs to
Date of birth of the employee
Date of joining of the employee
Unique identifier for each tax law
ID of the country the tax law belongs to
ID of the region the tax law belongs to
Tax bracket for the tax law
Tax rate for the tax law

Brief description of the user role
